name: strategic-pillars
description: Evaluate and improve strategic pillar slides — vision bar, 3-column framework, numbered badges
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with tight bullet counts (2-3 per pillar), summary metrics, and varied layout

prompts.text: Build a 3-pillar strategy slide: Revenue Growth (expand enterprise +15%), Product Innovation (ship AI platform), Operational Excellence (reduce costs 15%)
Build a 3-pillar digital transformation slide: Customer Experience, Data & Analytics, Cloud Infrastructure
Build a 3-pillar market entry strategy for Germany: channel build, localized product, regulatory readiness
Build a 3-pillar turnaround plan: simplify portfolio, reset cost base, rebuild commercial engine
Build a 3-pillar AI strategy: copilots for employees, AI features for customers, AI-enabled operations
Build a 3-pillar sustainability strategy: decarbonize operations, green suppliers, circular product design
Build a 3-pillar post-merger value creation slide: revenue synergies, cost synergies, operating model integration
Build a 3-pillar commercial acceleration slide: pricing, channel expansion, sales productivity
Build a 3-pillar product strategy: core platform hardening, adjacent workflow expansion, ecosystem partnerships
Build a 3-pillar talent strategy: leadership bench, critical skill hiring, productivity culture
